extraction.one_line_summary: DE GENDT attacked at kilometer zero, survived 200km solo to win in Santet while ALAPHILIPPE took yellow via 5-second intermediate bonus and 2-second finish bonus.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE won yellow jersey without attacking via bonuses: 5sec intermediate, 2sec finish, totaling 7sec swing.
TREK team let DE GENDT into break to avoid CCC team chasing aggressively and forming dangerous counter-breakaway.
PINOT paced ALAPHILIPPE after intermediate sprint, sacrificing own position to protect French yellow jersey ambitions in final kilometer.
Intermediate sprint bonus became decisive GC moment when ALAPHILIPPE took 5sec with PINOT 2sec, main field complacent.

rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: 200km solo break execution reveals exceptional diesel engine capacity, not just opportunistic breakaway rider
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: calculated yellow jersey capture through bonus hunting rather than mountain attacks signals tactical maturity evolution
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: sacrificed personal finish position to pace ALAPHILIPPE in final kilometer, prioritizing French yellow over own GC
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped on final climb approach before main selection, shocking weakness signal for former champion
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: INEOS deployed both white jerseys (BERNAL and unspecified teammate) suggesting uncertainty about GC leadership hierarchy
